title: Things That Feel Heavy but I Never Talk About as a Student
description: A quiet reflection on student life, Paying Guest living, loneliness, emotional growth, and simple routines that make heavy days feel a little softer.
author: Varsha's Quiet Notes

title: Living alone felt different than I expected
description: Honest notes from a student learning to live alone in a PG - small struggles, quiet routines, simple food, and emotional growth while adjusting to independence. A calm reflection on expectation vs reality and the soft lessons that come with managing studies and life away from home.
author: Varsha's Quiet Notes

title: This Is What Healthy Eating Looks Like in My PG Life
description: Simple healthy eating in PG life as a student living alone. Realistic meals, chai breaks, easy veggie cooking, and small habits that support long study days.
author: Varsha's Quiet Notes
